report.summary: Researched TON blockchain + crypto options trading; wrote 2 comprehensive learn guides (~2,400 words each); optimized SEO metadata and internal links; scaffolded both pages in Next.js; built an interactive OptionsPayoffCalculator component embedded in the options guide; added both slugs to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: TON is now exclusive blockchain for all Telegram Mini Apps — 950M+ monthly active Telegram users as distribution funnel
TON wallets grew from 4M to 128M+ in ~1 year; Notcoin (35M users), Hamster Kombat (300M combined) proved distribution thesis
TON DeFi TVL peaked at $726M Oct 2024; STON.fi and DeDust are leading DEXes; Bemo handles liquid staking
TON risks: ~350 validators (centralization), 68% supply whale-held, Telegram single-point dependency
Crypto options volume ~1% of total crypto derivatives; DeFi options growing 10x+ YoY
Derive.xyz (ex-Lyra) leads on-chain options with $20B+ cumulative volume; Premia, Panoptic, AEVO also key players
No existing degen0x guide on TON blockchain or crypto options — both are clear content gaps with high search intent
Options guide covers calls/puts, strike/expiry/premium, Greeks (Delta/Gamma/Theta/Vega), 5 strategies, DeFi protocols table

sections.title: Content Created
items: 2,400-word learn guide: 'TON Blockchain & Telegram Mini Apps Guide 2026' — 7 sections: What is TON, Sharding & Speed, Telegram Mini Apps & TON Connect, DeFi Ecosystem (table), Top dApps (6 app cards), Staking options, Risks & Criticisms + 6-question FAQ

2,600-word learn guide: 'Crypto Options Trading Guide 2026 — Calls, Puts & DeFi Options' — 8 sections: What are Options, Calls vs Puts (side-by-side cards), Key Terms table (7 terms), Greeks (Delta/Gamma/Theta/Vega), 5 Strategies with difficulty tags, DeFi Protocols table (5 protocols), Risks (5 items), FAQ (6 questions)
Both guides include comparison tables, info boxes, FAQ sections (SEO-optimized), internal links to related degen0x pages, and risk disclaimers

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: TON guide: title tag 'TON Blockchain & Telegram Mini Apps Guide 2026 | degen0x' (57 chars), meta desc 154 chars, OG article type + publishedTime, keywords: TON blockchain, Telegram mini apps, Toncoin, STON.fi, DeDust, etc.

Options guide: title tag 'Crypto Options Trading Guide 2026 — Calls, Puts & DeFi Options | degen0x' (68 chars), meta desc 152 chars, OG article type, keywords: crypto options trading, DeFi options, Derive, Premia, Panoptic, options Greeks, etc.
TON internal links: /learn/layer-2-scaling-guide, /learn/liquid-staking-derivatives, /learn/crypto-airdrops-2026, /tools/degen-score
Options internal links: /learn/perpetual-futures-guide, /learn/best-perpetual-dex-guide, /learn/advanced-defi-strategies, /learn/crypto-tax-guide-2026, /tools/dca-calculator
Both pages use <details> FAQ schema-friendly markup for People Also Ask targeting

sections.title: Interactive Component Built
items: Created src/components/OptionsPayoffCalculator.tsx — client component with SVG payoff chart
Features: call/put toggle, buy/sell toggle, adjustable strike/premium/spot/contracts via sliders
Shows: current P&L, breakeven, max profit/loss, real-time payoff curve with profit (green) / loss (red) area fill
Embedded directly into /learn/crypto-options-trading-guide between sections 4 and 5
Used inline SVG (no chart library) to maintain fast load times per codebase convention
